title: Brain Oxygen Optimization in Severe TBI, Phase 3

skipped_criteria: Glasgow Coma Scale motor score < 6 if endotracheally intubated: requires a separate GCS motor subscore field and conditional intubation status, neither of which exist in the schema.
Evidence of intracranial trauma on CT scan: requires imaging/diagnostic result field not in the schema.
Able to place intracranial probes and randomize within 6 hours of arrival at enrolling hospital: requires temporal/procedural logic not expressible in the schema.
Able to place intracranial probes and randomize within 12 hours from injury: requires time-from-injury field not in the schema.
Non-survivable injury (exclusion): requires clinical judgment field not in the schema.
Bilaterally absent pupillary response in the absence of paralytic medication (exclusion): requires neurological exam field not in the schema.
Contraindication to the placement of intracranial probes (exclusion): requires procedural contraindication field not in the schema.
Treatment of brain tissue oxygen values prior to randomization (exclusion): requires prior treatment history field not in the schema.
Planned use of devices which may unblind treating physicians to brain tissue hypoxia (exclusion): requires planned device use field not in the schema.
Systemic sepsis at screening (exclusion): requires infection/sepsis diagnosis field not in the schema.
Refractory hypotension (exclusion): 'refractory' implies treatment-resistant status beyond a simple SBP threshold, which cannot be fully expressed in the schema.
Refractory systemic hypoxia (exclusion): requires oxygenation status field not in the schema.
PaO2/FiO2 ratio < 150 (exclusion): requires arterial blood gas lab values not in the schema.
Known pre-existing neurologic disease with confounding residual neurological deficits (exclusion): requires prior medical history field not in the schema.
Known inability to perform activities of daily living without assistance prior to injury (exclusion): requires functional status history field not in the schema.
Known active drug or alcohol dependence that would interfere with physiological response (exclusion): requires substance use history field not in the schema.
Prisoner (exclusion): requires legal/custody status field not in the schema.
On EFIC Opt-Out list as indicated by a bracelet or medical alert (exclusion): requires consent registry/opt-out status field not in the schema.
